author: y4rr
content: Result: 11 new conformance tests in conformance_serialize_async.rs. Coverage: AsyncCheckpointer::new (not in-flight), Default (not in-flight), Debug format, save+wait+load round-trip (values/epoch/step/optimizer_state preserved), sequential saves (3 individual + 1 reuse-saver test), is_saving() false after wait(), wait() with no in-flight save, invalid-path errors on wait(). No Tokio dep needed — AsyncCheckpointer uses std::thread. One #852 exclusion entry removed. cascade_skip removed. 11/11 pass, clippy clean.
